examples: The hooter went a second time, this time longer and louder than the first.
The singer, 44, wore a bandage over his hooter and had a minder carry the brolly during a visit to a Las Vegas museum.
The Warriors attempted a late push but the Dragons held on to hooter to take the victory.
So the name was quickly changed to "Hooter Rangers: A Spicy Morphing Burlesque, " and the show went on.
Something his team-mates are unlikely to be when the hooter sounds in Wigan...
